name: snowflake
description: Snowflake query and monitoring integration for DuckPipe

tools.name: snowflake_query
tools.description: Execute a SELECT query (read-only role enforced at DB level)

tools.name: snowflake_get_query_profile
tools.description: Fetch execution plan for a specific query_id

tools.name: snowflake_cancel_query
tools.description: Cancel a running query by query_id
